name: telegram-backlogbot (Codespaces)
postStartCommand: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; if [ -n "${TAILSCALE_AUTHKEY:-}" ]; then sudo mkdir -p /var/run/tailscale; sudo tailscaled --tun=userspace-networking --state=/var/lib/tailscale/tailscaled.state --socket=/var/run/tailscale/tailscaled.sock >/tmp/tailscaled.log 2>&1 & sleep 1; sudo tailscale --socket=/var/run/tailscale/tailscaled.sock up --authkey="$TAILSCALE_AUTHKEY" --hostname="codespace-telegram-backlogbot" --accept-dns=false --accept-routes=true; else echo TAILSCALE_AUTHKEY not set; skipping tailscale up; fi'
